## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership meeting to discuss ongoing projects, hiring, and operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Company reached $6M ARR, with potential to hit $6.6M by end of Q1](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Urgent need to improve recruiting processes and hire key roles (account managers, production assistants)](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Capacity constraints and quality concerns require immediate attention and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [New client onboarding (Abnormal, Rapid) needs clear ownership and improved communication](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)

## Topics

### Financial Progress

  - [Hit $6M ARR milestone](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Potential to reach $6.6M ARR by end of Q1 if pending deals close (Webflow, Arcade, Stig, Sundit)](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [On track to 2x growth in one quarter, even without closing additional deals](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)

### Recruiting and Hiring Challenges

  - [Multiple roles need filling: account managers, SEO strategists, production assistants](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Workable UX issues making candidate review process time-consuming](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [Team to divide and conquer reviewing candidates; Marcel to take lead on problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)
  - [Considering using freelance recruiters to help triage candidates ($20-30/hour)](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2940.0)
  - [Emphasis on hiring senior, experienced candidates to maintain quality](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3544.0)

### Capacity and Quality Concerns

  - [Ada reported issues with work quality from some team members (Sudhira, Fatima)](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [Need to reduce rework and improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2241.0)
  - [Daniel to focus on building leverage through software development next week](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Kirkland (potential hire) viewed as valuable for bringing SEO expertise and large-scale experience](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3405.0)

### Client Onboarding and Management

  - [Abnormal Security and Rapid kickoffs scheduled for March 10th](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3883.0)
  - [Lack of clear ownership and communication around new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [Need to improve handoff process and calendar management for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3851.0)
  - [Marcel considering taking lead on Abnormal Security account due to his security experience](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3685.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Need for production assistants to help with publishing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2408.0)
  - [Daniel working on content OS platform to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)
  - [Exploring options for image selection automation and CMS output](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2648.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Jimmy working on account management, ad buying automations, and link building](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2039.0)
  - [Kyle focused on managing current accounts and preventing churn](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Bridget handling various operational tasks and recruiting support](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to lead problem-solving for recruiting process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2872.0)

  - [Team to improve communication and coordination around new client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=3800.0)
  - [Bridget to update next week's goals based on this meeting's discussions](https://fathom.video/share/GnhZhvq_uEzERzJWBByWz-edzeb_QA5j?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)
